power.method: AC 24V / High PoE (IEEE 802.3bt / Type 3 / class 6) 60W; Max. 87.12VA

features: zoom lens: 22x optical zoom, 10x digital zoom

built-in analytics: Smart Motion Detection (People Detection, Vehicle Detection), Smart Intrusion Protection (, People Line Crossing Detection, People Intrusion Detection, People Enter Area Detection, People Exit Area Detection, ...
detection range: detection: 128m-2770m, observation: 51.6m-1116.9m, recognition: 25.6m-554m, identification: 12.8m-277m
ONVIF Compliant: Profile S, Profile G, Profile T, Profile M

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
